title: Foi1ys Superhero Collectables
description: A Fun little Superhero Blind Box Collectables mod
body:
![Apex](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38b8ee5f801af95e135ebcbd19b1ea19daf7e19f.png)
[https://apexhost.gg/Foi1y](https://apexhost.gg/Foi1y)

![TITLE](https://i.imgur.com/60vApRw.png)

This is just a fun little mod I decided to code since the Characters are fun to design and the actual coding of the mod is simple af. I plan to add alot more characters and collections but if you have suggestions for Collections please send them in the comments

Collections will include 9 Characters total

Collectables can be found in
- Abandoned Mineshafts
- Ancient Cities
- Desert Pyramids
- End Cities
- Jungle Temples
- Bastions
- Nether Fortresses
- Buried Treasure

Blind Boxes can be found in 4 Different Structures and are guaranteed to spawn one of the Blind Boxes

![Blind Box](https://i.imgur.com/8n7BhUK.png)
